trickyParts: Cross-family review caught that cluster.advertise was also needed for the same docker0 interface issue on cluster gossip — added both client_advertise and cluster advertise
Refactored renderNatsConf to accept machineName instead of clientAdvertise string — cleaner since function derives both :4222 and :6222 ports internally
deviations: Added cluster.advertise in addition to client_advertise — not in original issue but same root cause (docker0 IPs leaking into gossip)
Changed render-nats-peer.sh to use NATS_HOSTNAME env var instead of NATS_ADVERTISE — derives both advertise addresses from hostname
openQuestions: Live cluster verification (routez, JetStream persistence) requires Tailscale-connected host — needs manual verification after deploy
